commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3df8e5ecb9a036f63c66361301862bab6c74a4a0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes update-time plugin payload smoke checks and missing-payload collection to validate bundle records through the shared bundle manifest loader while preserving native package validation for package-backed records.

PR surface: Source +125, Tests +247. Total +372 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main requires `package.json` for tracked update records, and this PR's branch still fails to classify persisted marketplace bundle records that do not carry `format`. I did not run a full macOS package update in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can address the missing persisted marketplace bundle record shape, but maintainers still need to choose the canonical PR among the open sibling fixes.

target.title: fix(update): validate bundle plugin payloads by manifest contract
target.author: lilan0125

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
